tasks.text: Massage, shampoo, and condition patron's hair and scalp to clean them and remove excess oil.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise patrons with chronic or potentially contagious scalp conditions to seek medical treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Treat scalp conditions and hair loss, using specialized lotions, shampoos, or equipment such as infrared lamps or vibrating equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
